real_employers.description: Our client, Maxar Technologies, is seeking a software engineer for a secure program.
This role is on behalf of Beacon Systems, a consulting partner with a remote delivery team.
We are partnered with Avenues International to fill this contract role for a Cobol developer.
Job Description: the team is hiring a Benefits Coordinator and mentions vendors supporting payroll operations.
The head of operations role is responsible for project management across multiple facilities.
Now hiring a Risk Management Manager where the source text says a CHANGE AGENT that will be driving transformation.
